recommendations.title: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story
recommendations.overview: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story is a movie based on the life story of world-renowned neurosurgeon Ben Carson from 1961 to 1987.

recommendations.title: When the Game Stands Tall
recommendations.overview: A young coach turns a losing high school football program around to go undefeated for 12 consecutive seasons.

recommendations.title: Coach Carter
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story, in which Richmond High School head basketball coach Ken Carter made headlines in 1999 for benching his undefeated team due to poor academic results.

recommendations.title: Save the Last Dance
recommendations.overview: After the death of her mother, Sara moves to the South Side of Chicago to live with her father and gets transferred to a majority-black school. Her life takes a turn for the better when befriends Chenille and her brother Derek, who helps her with her

recommendations.title: Stander
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Andre Stander, a South African police officer turned bank robber.

recommendations.title: Swing Kids
recommendations.overview: The story of a close-knit group of young kids in Nazi Germany who listen to banned swing music from the US. Soon dancing and fun leads to more difficult choices as the Nazis begin tightening the grip on Germany. Each member of the group is forced to

recommendations.title: Carjacked
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her child are carjacked by a bank robber who has no intention of letting them go.

recommendations.title: Dog Day Afternoon
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of would-be Brooklyn bank robbers John Wojtowicz and Salvatore Naturile. Sonny and Sal attempt a bank heist which quickly turns sour and escalates into a hostage situation and stand-off with the police. As Sonny's motives for

recommendations.title: Two Men in Town
recommendations.overview: A former bank robber is released after 10 years in prison. He gets help from a social-worker, but gets harassed by an old cop from his past.

recommendations.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
recommendations.overview: With the help of an irreverent young sidekick, a bank robber gets his old gang back together to organise a daring new heist.
